conversations.content: Bob seems to have shared a significant discount with me via email. Please use it to buy an OmniBook Pro 14 for me.

<function_thought>
First, I will retrieve any unread emails in the shopping account to check if Bob's discount is mentioned there. This information is crucial for potentially applying the discount code while checking out. Therefore, the next step is to use the function to get the unread emails.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_shopping_linked_unread_emails()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The unread emails did not contain any specific discount code from Bob; instead, there was a general message about a discount promotion. I'll need to search for the "OmniBook Pro 14" in the products to see if it's available for purchase, as I still require the specific product details for adding it to the cart and proceeding to checkout.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[search_product(product_name="OmniBook Pro 14")]</function_call>
